image:image.image:title: MABS 2006 - Display 1
image:image.image:caption: Bonsai exhibit at the 23rd MABS Spring Festival, 2006

image:image.image:title: Cedar Elm - Winter Silhouette
image:image.image:caption: Studio-quality winter silhouette showing exceptional ramification

image:image.image:title: Cascade Juniper
image:image.image:caption: Striking cascade-style juniper with flowing movement

image:image.image:title: Visitors at the 2005 Show
image:image.image:caption: Visitors admiring bonsai exhibits at the 2005 annual show

image:image.image:title: Hornbeam Forest Planting
image:image.image:caption: Elegant forest-style planting with multiple trunks

image:image.image:title: Japanese Maple - Multi-trunk
image:image.image:caption: Autumn color on a multi-trunk Japanese maple

image:image.image:title: Annual Show Exhibit, 2011
image:image.image:caption: Featured exhibit at the 2011 annual show

image:image.image:title: American Larch - Informal Upright
image:image.image:caption: Martin Schmalenberg - dramatic curved trunk with delicate foliage

image:image.image:title: Pete's Juniper - Deadwood Style
image:image.image:caption: Peter Michienzi - classic juniper with prominent jin and shari

image:image.image:title: Annual Show Table Display, 2005
image:image.image:caption: Table display showcasing companion plantings alongside bonsai

image:image.image:caption: Bonsai display at the 2005 MABS Spring Festival

image:image.image:title: John's Tree
image:image.image:caption: Member tree - John

image:image.image:title: Pine Rock Planting
image:image.image:caption: Pine trained over rock in a naturalistic style

image:image.image:title: Rain Tree - Formal Upright
image:image.image:caption: Lush green canopy in a classic formal upright style

image:image.image:title: Rocky Mountain Juniper - Andy Smith

image:image.image:title: Andy Smith Tree
image:image.image:caption: Andy Smith - refined styling on a collected tree

image:image.image:title: Andy Smith Specimen
image:image.image:caption: Andy Smith of Golden Arrow Bonsai - masterful deadwood work

image:image.image:title: Collected Specimen
image:image.image:caption: Yamadori collected from the wild - raw material with great potential

image:image.image:title: Collected Specimen II
image:image.image:caption: Wild-collected material showing years of natural character

image:image.image:title: Collected Specimen III
image:image.image:caption: Wild-collected material showing years of natural character

image:image.image:title: Collected Specimen IV
image:image.image:caption: Yamadori with exceptional trunk taper and deadwood

image:image.image:title: Collected Specimen V
image:image.image:caption: Wild-collected bonsai with natural windswept character

image:image.image:title: Collected Specimen - Detail
image:image.image:caption: Close-up showing deadwood and bark texture

image:image.image:title: D. Prescott Tree
image:image.image:caption: Member tree - D. Prescott

image:image.image:caption: Member tree showing careful development over years

image:image.image:title: Member Tree - Bonsai (Edited)
image:image.image:caption: Bonsai from GSBS member collection

image:image.image:title: Member Tree - Photo 1
image:image.image:caption: Bonsai from GSBS member collection

image:image.image:title: Member Tree - Photo 2
image:image.image:caption: Bonsai from GSBS member collection

image:image.image:title: Member Tree - Photo 3
image:image.image:caption: Bonsai from GSBS member collection

image:image.image:title: Member Tree - Photo 4
image:image.image:caption: Bonsai from GSBS member collection

image:image.image:title: Member Tree - Photo 5
image:image.image:caption: Bonsai from GSBS member collection

image:image.image:title: Andy Smith Demo - Step 2
image:image.image:caption: Cleaning and preparing the trunk for styling

image:image.image:title: Andy Smith Demo - Step 3
image:image.image:caption: Wiring primary branches into position

image:image.image:title: Andy Smith Demo - Step 4
image:image.image:caption: Refining branch placement and pad structure

image:image.image:title: Andy Smith Demo - Step 6
image:image.image:caption: Creating jin and shari deadwood features

image:image.image:title: Andy Smith Demo - Step 7
image:image.image:caption: Final adjustments to foliage pads

image:image.image:title: Andy Smith Demo - Finished
image:image.image:caption: Completed styling by Andy Smith - dramatic transformation

image:image.image:title: Arthur Skolnik Demo - Step 2
image:image.image:caption: Removing excess foliage to reveal trunk structure

image:image.image:title: Arthur Skolnik Demo - Step 3
image:image.image:caption: Wiring and positioning primary branches

image:image.image:title: Arthur Skolnik Demo - Step 4
image:image.image:caption: Refining the overall silhouette and branch angles

image:image.image:title: Arthur Skolnik Demo - Step 5
image:image.image:caption: Detailed work on secondary and tertiary branching

image:image.image:title: Arthur Skolnik Demo - Step 7
image:image.image:caption: Near-final adjustments to the composition

image:image.image:title: Arthur Skolnik Demo - Finished
image:image.image:caption: Completed demonstration tree by Arthur Skolnik

image:image.image:title: Colin Lewis Demo - Step 1
image:image.image:caption: Colin Lewis, internationally acclaimed bonsai author from Maine, begins his demonstration

image:image.image:title: Colin Lewis Demo - Step 2
image:image.image:caption: Evaluating the tree from multiple angles for best front

image:image.image:title: Colin Lewis Demo - Step 4
image:image.image:caption: Applying wire to shape the main branches

image:image.image:title: Colin Lewis Demo - Step 5
image:image.image:caption: Bending and positioning wired branches into the design

image:image.image:title: Colin Lewis Demo - Step 7
image:image.image:caption: Refining the overall composition and balance

image:image.image:title: Colin Lewis Demo - Step 8
image:image.image:caption: Final detail work on foliage pads

image:image.image:title: Colin Lewis Demo - Finished
image:image.image:caption: Completed demonstration tree by Colin Lewis - before and after transformation

image:image.image:title: Horst Krekeler Demo - Step 1
image:image.image:caption: German bonsai master Horst Krekeler begins styling a specimen at GSBS

image:image.image:title: Horst Krekeler Demo - Step 2
image:image.image:caption: Evaluating structure and planning the design approach

image:image.image:title: Horst Krekeler Demo - Step 3
image:image.image:caption: Wiring and shaping primary branches with precision

image:image.image:title: Horst Krekeler Demo - Step 4
image:image.image:caption: Detailed branch positioning and pad creation

image:image.image:title: Horst Krekeler Demo - Step 5
image:image.image:caption: Refining the tree's overall silhouette

image:image.image:title: Horst Krekeler Demo - Finished
image:image.image:caption: Completed demonstration by Horst Krekeler - masterful transformation

image:image.image:title: David Yedwab Demo - Step 1
image:image.image:caption: David Yedwab begins a tropical bonsai repotting demonstration

image:image.image:title: David Yedwab Demo - Step 2
image:image.image:caption: Removing the tree from its pot and examining the root ball

image:image.image:title: David Yedwab Demo - Step 3
image:image.image:caption: Combing out and pruning the root system

image:image.image:title: David Yedwab Demo - Step 4
image:image.image:caption: Preparing the new pot with drainage mesh and tie-down wires

image:image.image:title: David Yedwab Demo - Step 5
image:image.image:caption: Positioning the tree in the new pot and working in fresh soil

image:image.image:title: David Yedwab Demo - Finished
image:image.image:caption: Completed tropical repotting - tree secured and soil settled with chopstick technique

image:image.image:title: Open House 2004 - Display D
image:image.image:caption: Formal display arrangements with accent plantings

image:image.image:title: Open House 2004 - Display E
image:image.image:caption: Close-up of specimen trees at the open house exhibition

image:image.image:title: Open House 2004 - Display F
image:image.image:caption: Large collection of member trees on display tables

image:image.image:title: Open House 2004 - Display G
image:image.image:caption: Visitors viewing bonsai at the open house event

image:image.image:title: Open House 2004 - Display J
image:image.image:caption: Accent plantings and suiseki alongside bonsai exhibits

image:image.image:title: Open House 2004 - Display K
image:image.image:caption: Overview of the exhibition space at the 2004 open house

image:image.image:title: Open House 2004 - Demo Sequence 1
image:image.image:caption: Step-by-step demonstration for visitors at the open house

image:image.image:title: Open House 2004 - Demo Sequence 3
image:image.image:caption: Advanced technique demonstration at the open house event
